name: plan_ba_project
description: Create and manage Business Analysis projects. Use this to track a BA engagement from initiation through completion — capturing the business problem, methodology, sponsor, and lifecycle status. Call with action='create' to start a new project, 'update' to change fields, 'list' to see all user projects, 'get' to retrieve a specific project by id or name.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

name.description: Project name. Required for 'create'; used as lookup key for 'get'.

project_id.description: UUID of the project. Required for 'update'; used for 'get'.

description.description: Short summary of the project scope.

business_problem.description: The core business problem or opportunity this project addresses.

sponsor.description: Name or role of the project sponsor.

target_completion.description: Target completion date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

project.description: Full project record after the operation.
